http.title: HTTP Routes
http.description: Registered HTTP endpoints and their bound functions

http.description_body: Pikku prints your full route table at startup. Every method, route, function, and flag — visible in one place.
http.select_route: Select a route to view its details

schedulers.description: Cron and interval tasks that run on a schedule

services.description: Singleton services available across your application

database.title: Database
database.description: Visual schema for your local development database.
database.no_db_description: Add a SQLite or Postgres database to your pikku project.
database.no_visible_tables_description: All tables are hidden by the Pikku-internal filter.
database.setup_title: See your tables and data privacy here
database.setup_description: Run pikku db migrate to visualise your schema with column-level privacy classifications.

changes.title: Changes
changes.description: Compare the current project state against a base .pikku snapshot
changes.no_changes: No changes between ours and base.
changes.no_base_path_description: Enter a path to a .pikku directory above to diff against.

functions.title: Functions
functions.description: All registered pikku functions across your project
functions.select_function: Select a function to view details
functions.no_scenarios_linked: No scenarios are linked to this function yet.
functions.coverage_all_covered: All executable lines are covered for this function.
functions.coverage_branch_not_exercised: branch on line {{line}} is still not exercised

settings.title: Settings
settings.product_description: A visual explorer for Pikku project metadata. Browse functions, workflows, APIs, jobs, runtime services, and configuration.

oauth_callback.success_description: You can close this window. The connection status will update automatically.

tests.title: Tests
tests.description: Feature-first view of your test scenarios and function coverage
tests.no_scenarios_match: No scenarios match the current filter.
tests.empty_description: Run your function tests to populate scenarios here.

auth_providers.title: Auth Providers
auth_providers.description: Configure OAuth sign-in providers. Secrets are read from your environment via auth.js.

triggers.title: Triggers
triggers.description: Event-driven triggers wired to pikku functions
triggers.select_item: Select a trigger to view its details

packages.title: Addons
packages.description: Third-party addons and packages available for your project
packages.registry_unavailable_description: Could not fetch addons from the registry. Check your network connection.
packages.no_apis_description: Could not fetch APIs from the registry.
packages.community_headline: Extend your project in one click.
packages.community_subtext: Auth, payments, databases, agents and more — published by trusted partners and the open-source community, ready to install into your project.
packages.no_matches_hint: Try a different keyword or browse a category.
packages.publish_subtext: Publish your addon to the community library and let other teams install it in one click.

package_detail.select_variable: Select a variable to view its details

agents.title: Agents

audit.description: Activity log and audit trail for this stage
